Opinion agent extends base socmod::Agent to add opinions and stubbornness

Method step_opinions()

Usage

OpinionAgent$step_opinions()

Method new()

Usage

OpinionAgent$new(
  id,
  cultural_complexity = 2,
  bounded = FALSE,
  max_op_mag = 1,
  init_op_mean = 0,
  init_op_sd = 1,
  init_opinions = NULL,
  alpha = 1,
  ...
)

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

OpinionAgent$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.
